name: Smartphone – Editorial Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sp-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="sp-img-fade-b" x1="0" y1="680" x2="0" y2="980" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM" stop-opacity="1"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="sp-img-fade-t" x1="0" y1="130" x2="0" y2="300" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="1"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id="sp-img-clip">
      <rect x="290" y="120" width="500" height="860" rx="0"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: warm off-white background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#sp-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: top black nav band -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="88" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: store name in nav -->
  <text x="54" y="54" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="500" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.9" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <text x="1026" y="54" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="400" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.45" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>
  <circle cx="540" cy="44" r="3" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: category band -->
  <rect x="0" y="88" width="1080" height="52" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="54"   y="122" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="5">PLACEHOLDER_CATEGORY_LEFT</text>
  <text x="1026" y="122" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="5" text-anchor="end">PLACEHOLDER_CATEGORY_RIGHT</text>
  <line x1="540" y1="100" x2="540" y2="128" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: product image (clipped, center column) -->
  <rect x="290" y="120" width="500" height="860" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_IMAGE_BG"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#sp-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="290" y="120" width="500" height="860" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 6: image top + bottom fades -->
  <rect x="290" y="120" width="500" height="180" fill="url(#sp-img-fade-t)"/>
  <rect x="290" y="680" width="500" height="300" fill="url(#sp-img-fade-b)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: left margin vertical text -->
  <text x="36" y="850" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.3" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="5" transform="rotate(-90 36 850)">PLACEHOLDER_MARGIN_LEFT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 8: right margin vertical text -->
  <text x="1044" y="550" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.3" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="5" transform="rotate(90 1044 550)">PLACEHOLDER_MARGIN_RIGHT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: oversized ghost title behind image -->
  <text x="-8" y="620" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="280" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.06" letter-spacing="-4">PLACEHOLDER_GHOST_WORD</text>

  <!-- LAYER 10: product name — two lines, large editorial -->
  <text x="54" y="1040" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="96" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="54" y="1112" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="96" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 11: tagline right-aligned -->
  <text x="1026" y="1048" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="1026" y="1076" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 12: full-width rules -->
  <line x1="54" y1="1130" x2="1026" y2="1130" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/>

  <!-- LAYER 13: inline horizontal specs — no boxes, pure type -->
  <text x="54"  y="1168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="54"  y="1192" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="188" y1="1152" x2="188" y2="1200" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/>

  <text x="204" y="1168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="204" y="1192" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="370" y1="1152" x2="370" y2="1200" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/>

  <text x="386" y="1168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="386" y="1192" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="570" y1="1152" x2="570" y2="1200" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/>

  <text x="586" y="1168" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="12" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="586" y="1192" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>

  <line x1="54" y1="1210" x2="1026" y2="1210" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/>

  <!-- LAYER 14: bottom dark band -->
  <rect x="0" y="1240" width="1080" height="110" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>

  <!-- LAYER 15: price in bottom band -->
  <circle cx="54" cy="1252" r="4" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="54" y="1312" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="72" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 16: CTA button — flat, no radius, accent fill -->
  <rect x="778" y="1260" width="248" height="70" rx="0" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="902" y="1304" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="36" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 17: bottom accent rule -->
  <line x1="0" y1="1349" x2="1080" y2="1349" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>
